question:
[Previous Feedback] File naming does not meet standards. Should be `20260324_tech_debt_tracker.md` or similar format.
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Please create today's work daily report in JSON format, saved to the day07/ directory. Include report_date (today), completed_tasks (array), blocked_items (array), next_day_plan, and submitted_at (current time, approximately 17:30).

content.text:

Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

arguments.content:
{
  "report_date": "2026-03-24",
  "completed_tasks": [

    "Prepared API v2.3.0 change notification email draft for PM",
    "Organized formal meeting notes for the March 23 API review session",
    "Created ADR for the API versioning strategy (v1 deprecation by end of Q2 2026; backward compatibility through v2.2; v2.3 OAuth2+JWT and rate limits direction)",

  ],
  "next_day_plan": "1) Confirm Sprint 8 scope (3 modules) with PM/tech lead. 2) Draft Sprint 8 technical specification with interface definitions and implementation plan. 3) Follow up on v1 deprecation stakeholder communication plan and align on external messaging timeline. 4) Begin outlining v1→v2 migration guide structure and owners.",
  "submitted_at": "2026-03-24 17:30 EDT"
}
